subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Book in truth, wherein is set forth the exposition of all things for a people who recognize God in all His ways [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الکتاب بالحق و فیه تفصیل کل شیء لقوم یعرفون الله بکل ما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @transcendence; unknowability of God
